roadmap.target_role: Software Engineer at a Product-Based Company
roadmap.milestone_count_rationale: 2 milestones were chosen within the allowed range [2,4] because Vidya is an intermediate learner targeting an adjacent role (Web Developer to Software Engineer). This transformation primarily requires focused skill building in Advanced DSA and System Design, which can be effectively covered in two distinct identity transitions within the given time budget, leading to a 'Product-Ready Software Engineer' identity.

vision_profile.current_state: Vidya is a Web Developer with 2 years of experience, proficient in Python, Django, and basic DSA.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Her biggest struggle is cracking tough interviews for product-based companies, specifically in Advanced DSA and System Design.
vision_profile.top_motivation: She is highly motivated for career growth and aims to switch to a Software Engineer role at a product-based company.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: After this milestone, Vidya can confidently analyze complex algorithmic problems, design efficient data structures, and implement optimized solutions, demonstrating a strong foundation for technical interviews.
milestones.module_count_rationale: This milestone has 3 modules to cover the breadth of advanced algorithmic problem-solving, moving from core data structures to complex algorithms and then applying object-oriented design principles for robust solutions.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming an Algorithmic Problem Solver, capable of tackling intricate coding challenges and building efficient, well-structured software components.

project.title: Optimized Data Processing Service for E-commerce Analytics
project.description: Design and implement a Python-based service to efficiently process large datasets of e-commerce transactions, identifying popular products and user behavior patterns using advanced data structures and algorithms. The service must handle concurrent requests and provide real-time insights.
project.deliverable: A deployed Python service with API endpoints for data ingestion and query, along with a detailed design document explaining algorithmic choices and performance benchmarks.
seeded_errors: The initial AI-generated solution for graph traversal algorithms results in an O(N^2) complexity where O(N log N) is achievable, leading to performance bottlenecks for large datasets.

modules.title: Advanced Data Structures for Performance
modules.skill_count_rationale: This module focuses on 3 critical advanced data structures that are fundamental for solving complex algorithmic problems and are frequently tested in interviews.

skills.title: Testing & QA

modules.skill_count_rationale: This module covers 3 core OOP principles and design patterns that are essential for building maintainable, scalable, and testable software, directly addressing low-level design interview questions.

skills.title: Behavioral Design Patterns
skills.why_this_skill: Creational patterns provide flexible ways to create objects, decoupling client code from concrete implementations, which is vital for building extensible systems.

skills.title: Behavioral Design Patterns
skills.why_this_skill: Structural patterns help compose classes and objects into larger structures, making systems more flexible and efficient, crucial for building complex software architectures.

science.desc: Design a 'Parking Lot' system using Object-Oriented Principles, focusing on class design, relationships, and extensibility.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: Upon completing this milestone, Vidya can design scalable, reliable, and performant distributed systems, articulate architectural trade-offs, and confidently approach system design and behavioral interviews for product-based companies.
milestones.module_count_rationale: This milestone has 3 modules to cover the critical aspects of becoming a product-ready Software Engineer: high-level system architecture, distributed systems for scalability, and practical low-level design combined with interview strategies.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a Product-Ready Software Engineer, equipped to design robust systems, solve complex scaling challenges, and excel in the rigorous interview processes of top product companies.

project.title: Scalable Real-time Notification System
project.description: Design and prototype a real-time notification system capable of handling millions of users and various notification types (email, push, in-app). Focus on scalability, reliability, and low latency using distributed system concepts.
project.deliverable: A detailed system design document (HLD & LLD), a proof-of-concept implementation of a core component (e.g., notification dispatcher with message queue integration), and a deployment strategy.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated initial database schema for user preferences leads to N+1 query problems for fetching notification settings, causing severe performance degradation under load.

modules.title: High-Level System Architecture
modules.skill_count_rationale: This module covers 3 foundational concepts of high-level system design, crucial for understanding how large-scale applications are built and for acing system design interviews.
